cards.title: Organized tours
cards.body: Routes for your group and schedule. We offer comfortable buses and professional drivers for tours across Europe and Ukraine. Flexible route planning and stops at the group's request.

cards.title: Bus rental
cards.body: Transfers, corporate trips, excursions, and any events. We provide modern, comfortable buses and minibuses with professional drivers. Flexible rental terms - from a few hours to multi-day trips.

items.title: Reliability and safety
items.body: Experienced drivers, regular inspections, passenger insurance.

items.title: Convenience at every step
items.body: Purchase in a minute, e-ticket, clear schedule.

items.title: Discounts
items.body: Loyalty and promo codes - save on regular trips.

items.title: Support at every stage
items.body: We’ll help with booking, refunds, and baggage questions.

items.text: Found a route in 2 minutes, the trip was comfortable and cozy.
items.author: Ekaterina

items.text: Very satisfied with the service and driver. Everything on time.
items.author: Maria

items.text: Good company, comfortable buses and pleasant prices.
items.author: Oleg

promo.title: Ready to go?
promo.subtitle: Sign up and get your first trip with 10% off.
